title: Package (Homebrew)
description: Mengelola paket software di macOS menggunakan Homebrew.

commands.name: brew-install
commands.title: Brew Install
commands.examples:
brew install node
brew install python@3.11
brew install --cask visual-studio-code
brew install --cask google-chrome
brew install git wget curl
commands.notes: Formula = CLI tools, Cask = GUI apps.

commands.name: brew-search
commands.title: Brew Search
commands.examples:
brew search python
brew search --cask chrome
brew search node

commands.name: brew-update
commands.title: Brew Update & Upgrade
commands.examples:
brew update
brew upgrade
brew upgrade node
brew upgrade --cask

commands.name: brew-uninstall
commands.title: Brew Uninstall
commands.examples:
brew uninstall node
brew uninstall --cask firefox
brew uninstall --force python

commands.name: brew-list
commands.title: Brew List & Info
commands.description: Menampilkan paket yang terinstall dan informasi paket.
commands.examples:
brew list
brew list --cask
brew info node
brew deps --tree node

commands.name: brew-cleanup
commands.title: Brew Cleanup
commands.description: Membersihkan file cache dan versi lama.
commands.examples:
brew cleanup
brew cleanup -n
brew cleanup -s
brew cleanup --prune=all

commands.name: mas
commands.title: Mac App Store CLI
commands.description: Mengelola app dari Mac App Store via terminal.
commands.examples:
mas search Xcode
mas install 497799835
mas list
mas outdated
mas upgrade
